title: Women’s Ghosting and Movement Clinics
excerpt: Julie Multamaki will be running some 4-week ghosting and movement clinics on Saturdays, from February 10-March 3, 2018, and March 17-April 7, 2018, at the Edmonton Squash Club (ESC). Either clinic will be a great tune-up for those that want to work on improving their lunge and balance as they move into the ball, and … Read more
content:
Julie Multamaki will be running some 4-week ghosting and movement clinics on Saturdays, from February 10-March 3, 2018, and March 17-April 7, 2018, at the Edmonton Squash Club (ESC).

Either clinic will be a great tune-up for those that want to work on improving their lunge and balance as they move into the ball, and also their efficiency of movement off the ball and back to the T, prior to interclub playoffs.

This program focuses on movement fundamentals, split-step, lunging, maintaining balance while changing direction, hitting off the back foot, and basic to advanced movement patterns around the court.

4 x 90-minute clinics for women of all ability levels.

Preference will be given to those ladies who want to do 4 sessions.

A wait list (on a first-come basis) will be created for those ladies who are unable to do 4 sessions.

Dates, Pricing, and further information:

Clinic #1: Saturdays from Feb 10-Mar 3, 2018 (4 weeks) – Clinic Code #1360

Registration Deadline: February 4th, 2018 at 5pm

Clinic #2: Saturdays from Mar 17-Apr 7, 2018 (4 weeks) – Clinic Code #1361

Registration Deadline: March 11th, 2018 at 5pm

Times: Saturdays, 12:00pm – 1:30pm (90 mins)

4-week clinic Cost:

Member Cost: $60.00 for 4 sessions

Non-Member Cost: $85.00 for 4 sessions (includes clinic & entrance fees)

Individual sessions Cost:
Member Cost: $15.00 per clinic session

Non-Member Cost: $30.00 ($15.00 clinic + $15.00 entrance fee) per clinic session

Minimum # Participants per clinic: 6

Maximum # Participants per clinic: 16

Coach: Julie Multamaki

To Register:

Please visit the Edmonton Squash Club website (https://edmontonsquashclub.ca/), click on “Book a Court” and you’ll be directed to the login page.

For non-members, if you don’t already have a login account then you’ll need to create one.

(If you have trouble creating an account please contact the front-desk 780.306.2395, after 4pm on weekdays, and someone will be able to assist you)

Once you login, then click on “Register for Adult Programs” (under the Programs/Events Registration header.

Then click on the “Women’s Programs” button.

Then select “Register” (on the right-hand side of the page), for the clinic you wish to participate in.
